 {"id":"beads_rust-wyr","title":"Unit test coverage expansion (no mocks)","description":"# Unit Coverage Expansion

## Scope
- Add/expand unit tests across core modules without mocks/fakes.
- Use real SQLite (TempDir + .beads) and real JSONL files.

## Requirements
- Deterministic test data and timestamps.
- Avoid network access and external dependencies.
- Prefer table-driven tests to capture edge cases.

## Acceptance
- All unit suites pass via cargo test.
- New tests include edge cases + error paths.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:16:41.959059236Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T17:47:25.448907681Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T17:47:25.448907681Z","close_reason":"Fixed failing tests: added sync.* prefix to is_startup_key function, fixed determine_action test calls with missing 4th argument.  {"id":"beads_rust-xewv","title":"Conformance: Advanced Commands (epic, query, graph, changelog, history, audit)","description":"# Conformance: Advanced Commands

## Purpose
Verify br vs bd JSON parity for advanced commands: epic, query, graph, changelog, history, audit.

## Current State
NONE of these commands have conformance tests yet.

## Test Specifications

### epic Command (8 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_epic_status | Show epic with children | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_epic_add_child | Add issue to epic | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_epic_remove_child | Remove from epic | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_epic_close_eligible_true | All children closed | ExactJson |
| conformance_epic_close_eligible_false | Open children exist | ExactJson |
| conformance_epic_nested | Epic containing epic | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_epic_json_shape | JSON structure | StructureOnly |
| conformance_epic_not_epic_error | Non-epic issue | ExitCodeOnly |

### query Command (7 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_query_basic | Simple status filter | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_query_type_filter | type:bug | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_query_priority_filter | priority:<=1 | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_query_boolean_and | status:open AND type:bug | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_query_boolean_or | type:bug OR type:feature | ArrayUnordered |
| conformance_query_json_shape | JSON output | StructureOnly |
| conformance_query_syntax_error | Invalid query | ExitCodeOnly |

### graph Command (6 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_graph_empty | No dependencies | ExactJson |
| conformance_graph_simple | A→B | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_graph_complex | Multiple connections | StructureOnly |
| conformance_graph_json_shape | JSON structure | StructureOnly |
| conformance_graph_dot_format | --format dot | ExitCodeOnly |
| conformance_graph_filter_type | --type epic | NormalizedJson |

### changelog Command (6 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_changelog_basic | Closed issues listed | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_changelog_date_filter | --since flag | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_changelog_type_filter | --type feature | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_changelog_json_shape | JSON structure | StructureOnly |
| conformance_changelog_empty | No closed issues | ExactJson |
| conformance_changelog_markdown | --format md | ExitCodeOnly |

### history Command (5 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_history_list | List backups | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_history_save | Create backup | ExitCodeOnly |
| conformance_history_restore | Restore backup | ExitCodeOnly |
| conformance_history_json_shape | JSON structure | StructureOnly |
| conformance_history_empty | No backups | ExactJson |

### audit Command (5 tests)
| Test Name | Scenario | CompareMode |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| conformance_audit_basic | Audit log output | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_audit_filter_issue | --issue filter | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_audit_filter_action | --action filter | NormalizedJson |
| conformance_audit_json_shape | JSON structure | StructureOnly |
| conformance_audit_empty | No interactions | ExactJson |

## Logging Requirements
\`\`\`rust
// Standard logging for each test
fn log_conformance_result(
    test_name: &str,
    br_args: &[&str],
    bd_args: &[&str],
    br_out: &CmdOutput,
    bd_out: &CmdOutput,
    compare_mode: &CompareMode,
    result: &Result<(), String>
) {
    info!("=== {} ===", test_name);
    info!("  br_cmd: {:?}", br_args);
    info!("  bd_cmd: {:?}", bd_args);
    info!("  br_exit: {}", br_out.status);
    info!("  bd_exit: {}", bd_out.status);
    info!("  br_duration: {:?}", br_out.duration);
    info!("  bd_duration: {:?}", bd_out.duration);
    info!("  compare_mode: {:?}", compare_mode);
    match result {
        Ok(()) => info!("  result: PASS"),
        Err(e) => {
            error!("  result: FAIL");
            error!("  diff: {}", e);
        }
    }
}
\`\`\`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 37 new conformance tests
- [ ] All commands have JSON parity with bd
- [ ] Structured logging for every test
- [ ] Test failures include detailed diff output","notes":"SCOPE UPDATE: Only 3 of 6 commands have bd equivalents for conformance testing:
- epic: bd has this (8 tests possible)
- graph: bd has this (6 tests possible)
- audit: bd has this (5 tests possible)

Commands WITHOUT bd parity (br-only features, NO conformance tests):
- query: br only (bd doesn't have query command)
- changelog: br only (bd doesn't have changelog command)
- history: br only (bd doesn't have history command)

Total: 19 conformance tests instead of 37.

Work started by OpusAgent on 2026-01-17.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OpusAgent","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:10:48.577183305-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T12:24:49.333512177-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-17T12:24:49.333512177-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented 19 conformance tests for epic (8), graph (6), and audit (5) commands. 1 epic test ignored - documents known br/bd difference in parent-child dependency blocking semantics. query/changelog/history commands skipped - no bd parity.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-xewv","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-egz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:14:00.985880542-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-xs2","title":"E2E scenario: ready/blocked/stale/count/search","description":"# E2E: Ready/Blocked/Stale/Count/Search

## Steps
- Create issues with mixed status/priority/defer/pinned
- Add blockers and verify ready/blocked outputs
- Use stale/count/search with filters

## Logging
- Record command IO + timing for each query.

## Assertions
- Outputs match expected ordering and filters.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:26:55.785631047Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T17:20:08.377924562Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T17:20:08.377924562Z","close_reason":"Expanded E2E queries to cover ready/blocked/stale/count/search filters"}
